languages.text: "Не пытайтесь утешить меня несбыточным, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Эвакуация невозможна, и вы знаете это не хуже моего". {n}Разряд Движущей Силы вспыхивает в бионическом глазу Себериана, и из-под стыка феррум санктум с живой плотью просачивается капля машинного масла.{/n} "Бесплодные раздумья лишь приближают неизбежное". {n}Он шагает к Ларии и бережно приподнимает ее.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Не пытайтесь утешить меня несбыточным, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Эвакуация невозможна, и вы знаете это не хуже моего". {n}Разряд Движущей Силы вспыхивает в бионическом глазу Себериана, и из-под стыка феррум санктум с живой плотью просачивается капля машинного масла.{/n} "Бесплодные раздумья лишь приближают неизбежное". {n}Он шагает к Ларии и бережно приподнимает ее.{/n}
traits.speaker: Ancestor_MeleeRanged

languages.text: "Don't try to give me false hopes, my heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Не пытайтесь утешить меня несбыточным, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Эвакуация невозможна, и вы знаете это не хуже моего". {n}Разряд Движущей Силы вспыхивает в бионическом глазу Себериана, и из-под стыка феррум санктум с живой плотью просачивается капля машинного масла.{/n} "Бесплодные раздумья лишь приближают неизбежное". {n}Он шагает к Ларии и бережно приподнимает ее.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Do not attempt to comfort me with false hopes, heir. Evacuation is impossible, and you know this as well as I do." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the ferrum sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile brooding only hastens the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

"Do not attempt to comfort me with false hopes, heir. Evacuation is impossible, and you know this as well as I do." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye, and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the ferrum sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile brooding only hastens the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

"Don't try to give me false hopes, heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

"Don't try to give me false hopes, heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

languages.text: "Versucht nicht, mir falsche Hoffnungen zu machen, {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin}. Eine Evakuierung ist unmöglich, das wisst Ihr genauso gut wie ich!" {n}Ein Funke Antriebskraft flammt in Seberians bionischem Auge auf und ein Tropfen Maschinenöl sickert aus der Stelle, an der das Ferrum sanctum auf lebendiges Fleisch trifft.{/n} "Sinnlose Bemühungen beschleunigen das Unvermeidbare nur." {n}Er tritt an Laria heran und hebt sie sanft hoch.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't try to give me false hopes, my heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Versucht nicht, mir falsche Hoffnungen zu machen, {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin}. Eine Evakuierung ist unmöglich, das wisst Ihr genauso gut wie ich!" {n}Ein Funke Antriebskraft flammt in Seberians bionischem Auge auf und ein Tropfen Maschinenöl sickert aus der Stelle, an der das Ferrum sanctum auf lebendiges Fleisch trifft.{/n} "Sinnlose Bemühungen beschleunigen das Unvermeidbare nur." {n}Er tritt an Laria heran und hebt sie sanft hoch.{/n}

languages.text: « Ne me donnez pas de faux espoirs, {mf|héritier|héritière}. Nous ne pouvons pas évacuer, vous le savez aussi bien que moi. » {n}Un flot de Force Motrice illumine l'œil bionique de Seberian, et une goutte d'huile de machine s'échappe de la jointure entre le Ferrum Sanctum et la chair.{/n} « Nous agiter en vain ne fera que précipiter l'inévitable. » {n}Il fait un pas vers Laria et la soulève délicatement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't try to give me false hopes, my heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ne me donnez pas de faux espoirs, {mf|héritier|héritière}. Nous ne pouvons pas évacuer, vous le savez aussi bien que moi. » {n}Un flot de Force Motrice illumine l'œil bionique de Seberian, et une goutte d'huile de machine s'échappe de la jointure entre le Ferrum Sanctum et la chair.{/n} « Nous agiter en vain ne fera que précipiter l'inévitable. » {n}Il fait un pas vers Laria et la soulève délicatement.{/n}

languages.text: «No me dé falsas esperanzas, hereder{mf|o|a}. La evacuación es imposible; lo sabe tan bien como yo». {n}Una corriente de Fuerza Motriz reluce en el ojo biónico de Seberian y una gota de aceite de máquina escapa de la junta donde el Ferrum Sanctum se une con la carne.{/n} «Los esfuerzos vanos solo adelantan lo inevitable». {n}Da un paso hacia Laria y la toma en brazos con delicadeza.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't try to give me false hopes, my heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No me dé falsas esperanzas, hereder{mf|o|a}. La evacuación es imposible; lo sabe tan bien como yo». {n}Una corriente de Fuerza Motriz reluce en el ojo biónico de Seberian y una gota de aceite de máquina escapa de la junta donde el Ferrum Sanctum se une con la carne.{/n} «Los esfuerzos vanos solo adelantan lo inevitable». {n}Da un paso hacia Laria y la toma en brazos con delicadeza.{/n}

languages.text: "Bana boş umutlar vermeye kalkma vârisim. Tahliyenin imkânsız olduğunu sen de en az benim kadar iyi biliyorsun." {n}Seberian'ın biyonik gözünde Devinim Gücü parlıyor, Demir Kutak'ın canlı etle birleştiği yerden bir damla makine yağı sızıyor.{/n} "Beyhude çabalar yalnızca kaçınılmazı hızlandırır." {n}Laria'ya doğru adım atıp onu nazikçe kaldırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't try to give me false hopes, my heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bana boş umutlar vermeye kalkma vârisim. Tahliyenin imkânsız olduğunu sen de en az benim kadar iyi biliyorsun." {n}Seberian'ın biyonik gözünde Devinim Gücü parlıyor, Demir Kutak'ın canlı etle birleştiği yerden bir damla makine yağı sızıyor.{/n} "Beyhude çabalar yalnızca kaçınılmazı hızlandırır." {n}Laria'ya doğru adım atıp onu nazikçe kaldırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “别再给我虚假的希望了，我的继承人。撤离是不可能的，这点你我都心知肚明。”{n}塞贝里安的仿生眼里掠过一道源力的激涌，一滴机油从钢铁圣所与血肉交融的缝隙渗出。{/n}“徒劳的挣扎只会让不可避免之事来得更快。”{n}他走向菈丽雅，轻轻将她抱起。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't try to give me false hopes, my heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}

languages.text: 「希望を偽ってはならない、私の後継者。避難は不可能だ、お前もわかっているだろう。」{n}シベリアンの義眼に動機が閃き、聖鉄と生肉が接する部分から機械油が滲む。{/n}「無駄な努力は、避けられない運命を早めるだけだ。」{n}彼はラリアに近づき、優しく彼女を抱き上げる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Don't try to give me false hopes, my heir. Evacuation is impossible, you know this as well as I." {n}A surge of the Motive Force flashes in Seberian's bionic eye and a drop of machine oil seeps from the juncture where the Ferrum Sanctum meets living flesh.{/n} "Futile efforts only hasten the inevitable." {n}He steps toward Laria and gently lifts her.{/n}
